ValidationRule.description: Required fields when closing the ticket for Billing
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(
AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Completed'), RecordType.Name = 'Billing', TEXT(Origin) <> 'Deal Desk', Parent.RecordType.Name <>'SalesOps', OR( TEXT(Type) = '', TEXT(Case_Sub_Type__c) = '' ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Completed'), TEXT(Origin) = 'Deal Desk',
OR( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Contract Signed Manually - Quote for Deal Desk Review")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Similarweb MSA")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "DDQ (Due Diligence / Security Questionnaire)")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Customer Access")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Customer Invoice(s)/Collections")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Customer Vendor Form")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "RFP/RFI (Request for Proprosal)")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Opp Review: One-Time Product")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Company Documents (e.g. SOC 2, SOC 3, COI, Bank Letter)")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, "Third Party Access Agreement (TPAA)")),
OR( TEXT(Type) = '', TEXT(Case_Sub_Type__c) = '' ) ) ) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Before closing the case please fill out Case Type and Sub Type
